title: Team Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by donateToReserves on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls donateToReserves() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

red_flags: Unusual sequence of flash loan and reserve donation
summary: Attackers exploited a flash loan to drain liquidity from TeamFinance's lending protocol and then donated the stolen funds to reserves, draining the protocol's funds. A guard could have blocked such transactions.
